reports.title: Sparta 2.0: The European Defence Authority and the Recalibration of Continental Security Architecture
reports.summary: NERAI Strategic Analysis deep dive on the EU's most ambitious independent defence initiative. Three-scenario forecast: base case 60% probability of partial implementation by 2031, with €150–200B capability gap assessment and NATO compatibility analysis.

reports.title: NERAI Risk Pulse — Week 19: India-Pakistan Standoff Dominates, Iran Recalibrates, Israel Governance Crisis Deepens
reports.summary: Kashmir Military Escalation hits 86.9/100 — the highest reading in the 389-day dataset. Israel governance crisis at all-time high of 98.2. Egypt signals an emerging flashpoint with a 55× surge.

reports.title: W19 Alert: India-Pakistan Military Standoff — Kashmir Sub-Index Posts Largest Single-Week Spike in Dataset
reports.summary: Kashmir breaches 86.9/100 (+35.2 pts WoW), Pakistan at 84.6, India at 70.5. Simultaneous multi-country escalation in South Asia — not seen since index launch.

reports.title: Economic Effects of the Iran War on the United States: Strategic Analysis and Policy Implications
reports.summary: NERAI three-scenario analysis: best case +1.8–2.2% GDP, base case +0.5–1.0%, worst case −1.5 to −2.5%. Iran Bilateral Relations Index at 0.0543 signals 40–50% elevated probability of conflict expansion.

reports.title: W18 Risk Alert: Iran-Israel Escalation Threatens Global Energy
reports.summary: Iran's military escalation index stands at 100.0/100 — maximum NERAI rating — representing a +20.7-point surge from Week 17. Iran's government instability score reached 34.4/100.

reports.title: NERAI Risk Pulse — Week 18: Iran Nuclear Brinkmanship Reshapes Gulf Security
reports.summary: Iran's Military Escalation Index reaches 100.0 — the highest severity reading in NERAI's conflict taxonomy — driven by US-Israel coordinated strikes. Gulf energy corridor at critical risk.

reports.title: W18 Risk Alert: Global Risk Signals Show Stabilization Pattern
reports.summary: No escalating signals crossed the 0.50 threshold this week, marking a significant deviation from typical volatility patterns. NERAI composite stability confirmed.

reports.title: NERAI Risk Pulse — Week 18: Sahel Instability Accelerates
reports.summary: Geopolitical fragmentation across West Africa's Sahel region reaches critical thresholds. NERAI Instability Index at 0.78 — the highest recorded level in the region.

reports.title: UAE Exits OPEC: Gulf Realignment, Iran Risk, and the $118 Oil Shock
reports.summary: Saudi coup risk +149.2% forecast trend. Iran military escalation at 0.1983 (+102.6% vs 90-day baseline). Oil at $118/bbl. 25–35% probability of SA–UAE bilateral crisis.

reports.title: NERAI Intelligence Report — Will Argentina Escalate Tensions with the UK over the Falkland Islands?
reports.summary: Strategic deep-dive on Argentina-UK Falklands risk trajectory. NERAI bilateral tension index analysis with scenario modeling for escalation probability.

reports.title: NERAI Risk Pulse — Week 17: Iran Crosses Red Lines, G7 Unity Fractures, Pakistan on the Edge
reports.summary: NERAI composite risk index registers its sharpest single-week deterioration since October 2023, driven by simultaneous escalation across three independent flashpoints.

reports.title: NERAI Risk Pulse — Week 17: Switzerland Joins the Crisis Column, G7 Political Risk at Post-2020 Highs
reports.summary: Switzerland's unprecedented entry into NERAI's crisis watch list signals G7 political risk at post-2020 highs. Structural shifts in Western political stability accelerating.

reports.title: W16 Risk Alert: Nigeria Military Escalation Hits 0.784 — ISWAP Kills Brigadier General
reports.summary: Nigeria's military escalation index reaches 0.784 — the highest in West Africa this quarter. ISWAP eliminates senior military command in coordinated attack on Borno State.

reports.title: Nigeria's Military Crisis: NERAI Data and Ground Reality Converge
reports.summary: NERAI data registered it first. The ground confirmed it four days later. Deep-dive on how NERAI's Nigeria Military Escalation Index predicted the ISWAP offensive.

reports.title: NERAI Risk Pulse — Week 16: Nigeria Crosses Critical, Iraq Surges, Armenia & Tunisia Emerge
reports.summary: Nigeria crosses critical threshold. Iraq registers a sharp surge. Armenia and Tunisia enter NERAI's emerging watch list for the first time in Q2 2026.

reports.title: W15 Risk Alert: Gaza Military Indices at 0.99 — Near-Maximum Intensity Confirmed
reports.summary: Gaza military escalation index reaches 0.99 — near-maximum intensity in NERAI's dataset. Sustained above-critical readings signal entrenched conflict dynamics.

reports.title: NERAI Risk Pulse — Week 15: Gaza Hits Near-Maximum, Ghana Surges 1,700%, Ukraine Re-enters Watch List
reports.summary: Gaza at near-maximum intensity. Ghana records a 1,700% week-on-week surge — one of the sharpest single-week moves in the dataset. Ukraine re-enters NERAI watch list.

reports.title: W14 Risk Alert: UAE Military Indices Surge 1,100%+ in Seven Days
reports.summary: UAE military escalation index surges over 1,100% in a single week — the largest short-term percentage move recorded in the NERAI dataset since launch.

reports.title: NERAI Risk Pulse — Week 14: UAE Military Indices Surge 1,100%+ as Middle East Tensions Escalate
reports.summary: UAE military indices post the largest single-week percentage surge in NERAI's dataset. Middle East tension corridor reaches critical mass across multiple dimensions simultaneously.
